About

Our story, craft, and commitment to quality

The Art of Timeless Cashmere

Elevating everyday luxury with responsibly crafted cashmere essentials.

SkyCashmere is a premium fashion house redefining modern elegance through craftsmanship, purity, and comfort. Cashmere brand UAE · luxury knitwear · premium cashmere fashion.

Our Story

Crafted with Passion,Worn with Pride

SkyCashmere was founded with a singular vision — to create refined, timeless cashmere pieces that merge modern minimalism with uncompromising quality.

We saw a market crowded with fast fashion and diluted quality. Our inspiration was simple: bring back the art of slow, considered luxury. We source the finest fibres, work with skilled artisans, and design for longevity — not seasons.

Our vision is to be the Middle East's most trusted name in premium cashmere — where every piece feels exceptional from the first touch and lasts for years.

Learn More About UsRead Our Blog

Our Craftsmanship

Quality & materials that justify the premium.

Premium grade cashmere

We source only the finest long-fiber cashmere to ensure softness, durability, and superior insulation.

Ethical sourcing

Responsibly sourced fibres and sustainable production practices from trusted partners.

Precision crafting

Each garment is meticulously constructed for a flawless finish and lasting comfort.

Long-lasting durability

Designed and made to last for years — timeless over trend.

Our Philosophy

What we stand for.

  • —Timeless over trend
  • —Quality over quantity
  • —Comfort without compromise
  • —Sustainability matters

Why choose SkyCashmere

Trust and reassurance.

✓Premium long-fiber cashmere
✓Designed for longevity
✓UAE-based luxury brand
✓Worldwide shipping
✓Easy returns

Sustainability & responsibility

Conscious luxury.

We believe luxury and responsibility can coexist. From ethical sourcing and slow fashion principles to low-waste production and thoughtful packaging, we are committed to reducing our footprint while delivering pieces you can wear with pride.

  • ·Ethical sourcing and fair trade practices
  • ·Slow fashion — made to last, not to replace
  • ·Low-waste production and responsible packaging
  • ·Transparency in our supply chain

Our mission

To redefine modern luxury through timeless cashmere essentials crafted with integrity.

Our vision

To become the Middle East's most trusted premium cashmere brand.

Our promise

Every SkyCashmere piece is designed to feel exceptional — today and years from now.

Discover scarves, shawls, and knitwear crafted for comfort and style.
